tools.name: bind_list_accounts
tools.description: List the BIND bank accounts visible to the configured credentials, with balances and CBUs.

tools.name: bind_get_movements
tools.description: Get the movements (transactions) of a BIND bank account with date filters and pagination.

tools.name: bind_get_cbu_owner
tools.description: Check who owns a CBU, CVU, or alias before paying.

tools.name: bind_create_transfer
tools.description: Transfer pesos from a BIND bank account to a CBU, CVU, or alias. Irreversible once completed.

tools.name: bind_create_debin
tools.description: Create a DEBIN request to collect pesos from a buyer's account; the buyer approves it on their side.

tools.name: bind_get_echeqs
tools.description: List echeqs (electronic checks) for a BIND account filtered by status and perspective.
